title: conyza fastigiata
intro: Conyza fastigiata, also known as bushy fleabane or narrow-leaved fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting digestive health. Conyza fastigiata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and resilience.
